evidence: Full-file review. Per-task call/system checks are separated from usage recording, and system accounting is skipped when InvokeContext.system is None.

Full-file review. InvokeContext supplies security-sensitive provenance/role/profile/system/cost metadata; side-effecting calls can execute without an approval gate, mission/guard checks are non-atomic, credential revoke is post-await only, and only ToolResult.output is scanned.
Full-file review. Mission check and record are distinct operations; allowed_systems is not applied to calls whose context omits system metadata.
Full-file review. Scanner traverses string values but intentionally preserves object keys and has no explicit output size/depth/work ceiling.
